untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (height and width calculations based on highest/lowest within a pattern, and pattern duration measurement) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The signal also lacks explicit exit conditions (AUTHOR_SILENT) and missing success rate/performance data. Pattern height computation and pattern identification require lookback window analysis and pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about chart pattern morphology (height relative to breakout price, width relative to median pattern length) which requires identifying pattern boundaries and measuring multi-bar characteristics. The allowed indicators are point-in-time technical measures (RSI, MACD, moving averages, etc.) and do not include pattern detection capabilities. A proper implementation would require custom pattern recognition logic external to this rules engine.
